title: Galactic Escape
description: A pilot and a robot must escape a collapsing space station.

title: The Haunted Reel
description: A lost film begins to affect everyone who watches it.

title: Laugh Track Love
description: Two rival comedians accidentally book the same wedding gig.

title: Castle of Shadows
description: A young knight discovers that the castle itself is alive.

title: Detective Midnight
description: A detective has one night to solve a city-wide mystery.

title: Pizza Planet Panic
description: A pizza delivery driver accidentally becomes a superhero.
